html:
Exclusive to:

The Magician's Top Hat is a clothing item unique to Maxwell added in Don't Starve Together. It is crafted from a regular Top Hat and two units of Nightmare Fuel. It provides access to the shadow dimension shared by Shadow Chester and the Magician's Chest, but it can only be used by Maxwell; for other Characters, the hat is no different from a regular top hat. With default controls, Maxwell players can access the shadow dimension either by right-clicking the hat while equipped, or by holding Alt and right-clicking the hat while unequipped.

The shadow dimension stores up to 12 stacks of items, and items in it spoil at 1.5 times the regular spoilage rate. One shadow dimension exists per shard; thus, surface and Caves worlds will have different shadow dimensions, and the shadow dimension cannot be used to transport items across shards. The loss of any container linked to the shadow dimension does not affect the items stored inside, even if there are no such containers left in the world. In this case, the items can be accessed again as soon as a new shadow dimension container is created.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

All the skins of Top Hat can be applied to Magician's Top Hat.


Trivia

  • In the beta test of Maxwell's rework, when using Codex Umbra, in addition to 4 items that were included in the final version of the update, it was possible to select a spell that allows you to turn the Top Hat in your inventory into a Magician's Top Hat

Gallery

  • Magician's Top Hat animation concept from Rhymes with Play "Maxwell's Character Refresh"
  • Magician's Top Hat in Codex Umbra Menu

"tophat_magician"
“That hat just oozes style.”
–Wilson
“Aww, I thought I saw smoke, but it's just Max's shadow gunk.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang would rather wear something else.”
–Wolfgang
“The darkness has changed it.”
–Wendy
“EXCELLENT. IT LOOKS MUCH MORE EVIL NOW”
–WX-78
“It has been imbued with an ectoplasmic residue.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'll stick to a nice cozy toque, thanks.”
–Woodie
“Tall, dark and dapper.”
–Maxwell
“It hath been töuched by dark magic.”
–Wigfrid
“Not quite like father used to wear.”
–Webber
“I can't think of any occasion I'd wear that to.”
–Warly
“Soft... and scary”
–Wormwood
“Max is a little too good at keepin' things under his hat.”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, he's up to his old tricks!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, fancy hat got all gloopy.”
–Wurt
“Do you think he can teach me how to pull rabbits out of it?”
–Walter
“A bit drab for my tastes.”
–Wanda

The shadow dimension stores up to 12 stacks of items, and items in it spoil at 1.5 times the regular spoilage rate. One shadow dimension exists per shard; thus, surface and Caves worlds will have different shadow dimensions, and the shadow dimension cannot be used to transport items across shards. The loss of any container linked to the shadow dimension does not affect the items stored inside, even if there are no such containers left in the world. In this case, the items can be accessed again as soon as a new shadow dimension container is created.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Phù Thủy là một trang phục độc nhất của Maxwell được thêm vào trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được chế tạo từ một Mũ Top thông thường và hai đơn vị Nhiên liệu Ác mộng. Nó cung cấp quyền truy cập vào chiều không gian bóng tối được chia sẻ bởi Shadow Chester và Rương pháp sư, nhưng nó chỉ có thể được sử dụng bởi Maxwell; đối với các Nhân vật khác, chiếc mũ không khác gì một chiếc mũ chóp thông thường. Với các điều khiển mặc định, người chơi Maxwell có thể truy cập vào chiều không gian bóng tối bằng cách nhấp chuột phải vào chiếc mũ khi được trang bị hoặc bằng cách giữ Alt và nhấp chuột phải vào chiếc mũ khi không trang bị.
